Table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

Card of table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

Name

DCS_TOUCHPOINT

Code

DCS_TOUCHPOINT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_COMMON_LAYER" schema

called "DCS_TOUCHPOINT".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY based on (STORE_LOCATION_ID, VALID_FROM, MARKET_CODE)

 

 

4. Use "_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME" (tech column generated while loading data via Matillion) to set up record validity in history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO).

 

5. Save the table definition.

 

6. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

7. Set up the data Load type to "Incremental" where history should be captured and the end result styas deduplicated.

 

8. Verify whether the newcoming ingested records in the source already exist in the Presentation Layer with any previous load, based on the

Unique Record Identifier.

i. If Yes, don't propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

ii. If No, propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

 

 

9. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

10. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

CKT_DCS_TOUCHPOINT


Server validation rule of the table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_TOUCHPOINT

drop table DCS_TOUCHPOINT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_TOUCHPOINT
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT (
DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_GUEST_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
STORE_LOCATION_ID INTEGER not null,
POSCODE TEXT,
COMPANYID INTEGER,
CATEGORY TEXT,
NAME TEXT,
ADDRESS1 TEXT,
ADDRESS2 TEXT,
CITY TEXT,
STATEPROVINCE TEXT,
COUNTRYCODE TEXT,
ZIPCODE TEXT,
OPENINGHOURS TEXT,
OPEN24HOURS TEXT,
MIPTOUCHPOINTID TEXT,
DESCRIPTION TEXT,
POSITION TEXT,
STATUS TEXT,
LONGITUDE TEXT,
LATITUDE TEXT,
LANGUAGE TEXT,
HIDDENFORMAP TEXT,
PHONE TEXT,
AVAILABLEFORHOSTESS TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_TOUCHPOINT primary key (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.DCS_GUEST_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.STORE_LOCATION_ID is
' ';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.COMPANYID is
'Store / Company identifier';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.STATUS is
'Order status code identifier (values vary per market):';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.LATITUDE is
'Customer  language';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.PHONE is
'Phone Number';

comment on column PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT
add constraint FK_DCS_TOUC_R13_GUEST_DCS_GUES foreign key (DCS_GUEST_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST (DCS_GUEST_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT
add constraint FK_DCS_TOUC_R37_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

Name

Code

DCS

DCS
